name: South America Map Labeling Activity
description: Create a 3-page interactive geography lesson flipchart about South America. Page 1 must be a title page with the text "South America: Countries and Capitals". Page 2 must feature the map image from /home/ga/Pictures/ActivInspire/south_america_map.png with text labels for Brazil, Argentina, Colombia, Peru, Chile, and Venezuela connected to their respective locations on the map using lines or arrows. Page 3 must be titled "Label the Map" and contain the same six country names as separate, individual text objects. Save the completed flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/south_america_map.flipchart.
